ADR-014: Event-Driven Messaging Platform

Context:
  Services currently share state via synchronous REST calls, creating tight coupling
  and cascading failures during high-load periods.

Decision Record:
  Adopt Azure Service Bus for all inter-service events going forward.

Options Considered:
  Option A: Azure Service Bus — managed service, native RBAC, dead-letter queues.
  Option B: Kafka on AKS — higher throughput ceiling but requires cluster management.

Tradeoffs:
  Service Bus has lower operational overhead.
  Kafka offers higher throughput but team has no operational experience with it.

Constraints:
  Team has no Kafka operational experience.
  Architecture review board must approve any new infrastructure additions.
